hyperedges.label: SMF Metadata Extraction and WAV Embedding
SDL Audio Output via RingbufferView Pipeline

nodes.label: Buffer Size Design (standard frontend)
nodes.rationale: Upstream's buffer handling was buggy: read position advanced unconditionally allowing it to overtake write position causing dropped frames. This fork corrects ringbuffer behavior so read only advances when audio is available, and buffer size is in frames (not samples) used without modification by both emulator and output.
